name: do-read-then-write-summary
description: Agent reads a code file and writes a summary file based on it

turns.user: Read app.py and create a summary.txt describing the API endpoints.

input.contents:
API Summary for app.py

Endpoints:
  GET /api/users  - Returns a JSON list of users (id and name)
  GET /api/health - Returns a JSON health status object

Server runs on port 5000.

responses.text: Read app.py and created summary.txt with a description of its two API endpoints.
